id.description: The unique ID of the factor.

type.description: The type of the factor to enroll.

phone_number.description: The user's phone number for SMS-based authentication.

issuer.description: Your application or company name displayed in the user's authenticator app. Defaults to your WorkOS team name.

user.description: The user's account name displayed in their authenticator app. Defaults to the user's email.

secret.description: TOTP secret that can be manually entered into some authenticator apps in place of scanning a QR code.

qr_code.description: Base64 encoded image containing scannable QR code.

uri.description: The `otpauth` URI that is encoded by the provided `qr_code`.

totp.description: TOTP-based authentication factor details. Includes enrollment secrets only available at creation time.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
